name: Orum AI Sales Dialer API
what_it_does: AI-powered parallel sales dialer with API — enabling SDRs to call multiple prospects simultaneously with AI detecting live answers vs voicemails, connecting reps only to live humans, automating voicemail drops, providing call analytics, and integrating with Salesforce and sales engagement platforms for complete call workflow automation.
use_calls: Querying call session analytics and connect rates for SDR performance reporting
Integrating Orum call activity data with Salesforce for complete pipeline activity logging
Triggering call sessions with prospect lists from CRM via API integration
Pulling voicemail drop performance data for message optimization
Monitoring dial-to-connect ratios for team coaching and quota planning
not_for: Inbound call center routing (use Talkdesk or Five9)
Email and multi-channel sequences (use Outreach or Salesloft for full sequences)
Customer support voice interactions (use Zendesk Talk or Intercom)
best_when: A high-velocity sales development team wants AI parallel dialing to dramatically increase live conversation rates, with voicemail drop automation and CRM activity logging to maximize SDR calling efficiency.
avoid_when: You need full multi-channel engagement sequences, inbound call routing, customer support, or have low-volume calling needs that don't justify parallel dialing complexity.

auth.notes: API key from Orum account. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for call events (answered, voicemail, disconnected, disposition). Salesforce and sales engagement platform integrations via native connectors. No OAuth2.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user subscription; contact sales for pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2019. Raised $22M+ Series B. Backed by Craft Ventures, Craft Ventures, 8VC. AI live-answer detection differentiator — only connects reps to live humans, skips voicemails automatically. Parallel dialing (multiple simultaneous dials). Power dialer mode for single-line dialing. Warm transfer for meeting handoffs. Popular with Series A-C SaaS sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for call sessions, analytics, and activity data. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Parallel dialing is real-time operation — API is primarily for data and configuration. Webhook for call events. Salesforce integration for activity sync. TCPA compliance required for calling automation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Call session reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Activity reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: TCPA compliance required — parallel dialing to cell phones has strict regulations
Do Not Call (DNC) list compliance mandatory for automated dialing
Real-time parallel dialing is browser/app-based — API manages data, not live calls
Salesforce integration required for full workflow automation
State-specific calling laws vary — verify jurisdiction compliance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. TCPA and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Call recordings are sensitive — implement access controls and retention policies. Prospect phone numbers are PII — GDPR and CCPA compliance required. TCPA parallel dialing regulations require compliance review before deployment.
